decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_headline_scale: mixed — huge first name, smaller subtitle underneath
hero_cta_style: floating action buttons with hover effects
nav_style: hamburger menu icon only (even on desktop)
card_style: minimal — no cards, just separated content blocks
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
contact_style: split layout — message on left, links on right
footer_style: playful — with an emoji or easter egg
border_radius: pill — fully rounded on small elements
quirk: add a subtle CSS grid/dot pattern visible on the background
bonus_quirk: one section has an inverted color scheme compared to the rest
